items.text:
Hello everyone! 

Sharing information about the upcoming PRACTICE LAB by PROJEKT EUROPA in London - all workshops are led by wonderful international artists!

**10 June 2026 - 18:00-20:00**- Chisenhale Dance Space, 64-84 Chisenhale Road, London, E3 5QZ.

**Ensemble Theatre Making with Halfpace Theatre **led by** **Megan Brewer 

This session looks at ways of building an ensemble as a foundation for devised work and how to build a welcoming environment for your collective. We’ll go over co-creating codes of conduct, exercises and warm-ups to foster team understanding and trust; how to take a survey of ‘who is in the room’; and a few ways to devise using collective movement and elements such as sound and lighting.

PRACTICE LAB is a curated series of workshops by PROJEKT EUROPA led by international theatre makers, offered in partnership with Chisenhale Dance Space in London. These workshops are aimed at sharing the wealth of skills and knowledge in the migrant artist community and creating new and unexpected connections between theatre makers from all communities.

Participants are asked to make a small contribution, starting at £5, to help cover programme costs.

For more information and to book, visit: [[https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6MURtkiwi5u3I_SjuOeBAfY7AhWr_i_KdAjMyVqhVAnbPHXVMkLj0S_xAWqA_aem_37e7tl3N7fomzbiT0SDj9A&brid=YWdncwF3oE3PfCy7A0jt9rzAm-C7)]([https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.projekteuropa.org%2Flab%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wH2CMLT7rt0F69kpeSpbP2xb2LbM9OutspDRlsbYsF5bpy77HRxa7r96Lmw_aem_yFDP_eO7ruhhw9vumhF_VA%26brid%3DYWdncwFNOV3hP8jxUEkazqmV3Nih&h=AUBpqUPyU0dHXZTC59jShCXyR0QWcXJG99MbQSIbjO2i38w0UKCKLdUNkBJmWvchtIOHBojgs88hkA9Iza3xjfQcKl3_MHG90oS0yhWAmo4Yw7NHhbQFBzmy-_3-GC5gDK6hcgyyPlROyQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDmrSsYxuTJ93CtqBRxUqmGGyzMN-fumFjddGqenYoCv__WxU-R-rBxBLYUqkVWPEN-oJewkZ5Kg2_gSOJsp9rOvig5IxIXcdjqoRLJY8E3AoyiQpuq5gzN28QMaQQ9cq9-pr7jccDCk_HAPXrMnWqcMCRSWY3QIM6RCgN49Hvp))

Thank you!

items.title: Hello everyone!

items.text:
Get your** EARLY BIRD DISCOUNT before May 31st**! 

**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy** 
**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

>> **Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** 
>> **Organic Breathing & Image Work**
>> **Kutiyattam Traditional Theatre** (Kerala, India) 
>> **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> **The Actor’s Energy and Presence** 
>> **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia 🇭🇷, **Remith Ramesh**, India 🇮🇳, **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰, **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: **Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳, **Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮, **Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮, **Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭** Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text: Joe TenBroek, David Versace, Michael Pickard, and I want to give a huge shout-out to all the amazing creatives, collaborators, artists and all-stars that created this amazing Concept Pilot! We couldn't fit everyone into the video, so I ask you to please take a moment to check out The Hook IMDb page, and give these people the congratulations they deserve! Take a bow! Not too shabby for ST Park Productions first project!

sharedPost.text:
We wanted to do something special for the extraordinary cast and crew that we had aboard. We hope you enjoy the footage.

We are so grateful for the expertise, love, and support from these fine individuals. There is no concept pilot without you. Seriously. From the bottom of our hearts: Thank You.

Some may not be pictured here, due to limited BTS, but every single person on this project was so critical to it's success. Rock on, everyone!

Don't get Addicted, Get Hooked!!!

🎬 Do nowego serialu fabularnego, którego akcja dzieje się w czasach współczesnych, szukamy statystów w wieku 40-60 lat oraz statystów z autem 

📍 Zdjęcia realizujemy:
• 30 maja (sobota)
• 31 maja (niedziela)

📍 Lokalizacja:
ul. Borowa, Otwock

🕘 Plan dzienny rozpoczynający się około 6.00 rano

💰 Stawka:
120 zł netto za dzień zdjęciowy.
220 zl. netto statysta z autem 

❗Nie jest wymagana dyspozycyjność na oba dni — można zgłosić się tylko na 30 lub tylko na 31 maja.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres:
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com

W zgłoszeniu należy podać:
• imię i nazwisko
• numer telefonu
• wiek
• dyspozycyjność (30 i/lub 31 maja)
• dwa aktualne zdjęcia:
– portret
– sylwetka
- osoby zgłaszające na plan auto dodatkowo zdjęcie samochodu i marka

📌 W temacie maila prosimy wpisać:
OTWOCK

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie przesłanych zdjęć.
Będziemy kontaktować się z wybranymi osobami.

Zapraszamy! 🎥

items.text:
Hey everyone! I’m currently a film student looking to get real on-set experience and start building my career in the industry.

I’m super passionate about filmmaking and want to learn as much as I can by actually being on set whether that’s as a production assistant, helping behind the scenes, or just being an extra and observing how everything runs.

If anyone has advice, knows of opportunities, or is working on projects that could use an extra set of hands, I’d really appreciate the chance to be involved. I’m reliable, eager to learn, and ready to put in the work.

Thanks in advance!

Based in Southern California

items.text:
**KEY GRIP + GRIP TRUCK NEEDED — SHORT FILM (JUNE 18–20)** 

Hey gang! We’re currently looking for an experienced **Key Grip with a Grip Truck** for an upcoming **short film production** shooting **June 18th–20th**.

This project is **SHALOM SALAM: A RECIPE FOR PEACE** — a powerful and uplifting film about connection, humanity, and bridging divides through culture and community.

I’m incredibly proud to be part of this project alongside award-winning filmmakers **Bayou Bennett** and **Daniel Lir** of Dream Team Directors — a directing duo with **80+ international film awards** and over **16 years** of creating visually stunning, emotionally impactful films centered around humanity and connection.

 **Shalom Salam** tells the story of an Israeli and Palestinian entrepreneur who come together through food, technology, and community to inspire peace in a divided world.

 **Project Info:**
https://seedandspark.com/fund/shalom-salam-a-recipe-for-peace#story

**PROJECT DETAILS**
**Position:** Key Grip + Grip Truck
**Shoot Dates:** **June 18–20**
**Project Type:** Short Film
**Rate:** **$800–$900 Per Day** (depending on package/availability)
**Location:** Washington State
**Status:** Non-Union 

We’re looking for someone dependable, collaborative, and comfortable working on an indie narrative set. Grip truck package details and previous work/reel are appreciated when reaching out.

If interested, please send:
• Your experience/resume
• Grip truck package details
• Availability for the shoot dates
• Contact info

 **Contact:**
Henry Galliett
henrygalliett@gmail.com
425-623-5677

Please share with anyone who may be a good fit!

THOUSAND CONVERSATIONS. ONE MEAL AT A TIME. sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy Horror Spielfilm Projekt, suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Einen Hauptmann und einen Leutnant der Schwarzen Ritter (mit Dialog). Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald, Zeitraum ab Juni 2026
Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
🎬 CASTING-ALARM: Wirst du Teil von Uwe Bolls nächstem Blockbuster? 🎬

Du wolltest schon immer mal Filmluft schnuppern, Regie-Legende Uwe Boll live in Action erleben und dich selbst auf der großen Leinwand sehen? 

Dann ist das hier deine Chance!

Für einen spektakulären Filmdreh (und zwar dem inoffiziellen HOUSE OF THE DEAD Sequel: 23 YEARS LATER – ZOMBIES IN THE CASTLE) verwandeln wir die legendäre Burg Frankenstein in eine filmische Kulisse – und wir brauchen DICH als Statist, Komparse oder Crew-Mitglied hinter der Kamera!!

🏰 DIE FACTS:

Wann: Anfang September 2026 (04.09. - etwa 09.09.)

Wo: Burg Frankenstein, Mühltal bei Darmstadt

🧟 WEN WIR SUCHEN:

Jede Menge motivierte Gesichter! Egal ob jung oder alt, „Männlein“ oder „Weiblein“, markant oder klassisch – wir suchen die volle Bandbreite an Charakteren.

Wir brauchen Leute, die Bock auf ein unvergessliches Set-Erlebnis haben. 

Keine Vorerfahrung nötig! Bring einfach gute Laune, Geduld (ja, Filmsets bedeuten auch mal Warten 😉) und die Bereitschaft mit, Vollgas zu geben, wenn es heißt: „Und Action!“. 
Und zwar sowohl VOR, als auch HINTER der Kamera! 

💥 DAS ERWARTET DICH:

👉Ein exklusiver Blick hinter die Kulissen einer echten Film-Produktion.

👉Kulinarische Verpflegung am Set (niemand hungert bei uns!).

👉Eine unvergessliche Zeit auf einer der unheimlichsten und coolsten Burgen Deutschlands. (Das wird mein 7. Film. Und, ja, es war jedesmal eine absolut coole und unvergessliche Zeit!!)

 🔥Bist du bereit für das filmische Inferno auf Burg Frankenstein? Dann bewirb dich JETZT! 🔥

📩Schicke uns einfach eine kurze Nachricht per WhatsApp an:  an:  

+49 151 681 72 591

Teilen erwünscht! Markiert eure Freunde, die schon immer mal ins Kino gehörten!

‼️Und noch ein wichtiger privater Tipp: ‼️

Da es sich um einen Horrorfilm handelt, bringt unbedingt einen kompletten Satz Wechselkleidung mit!!

(Unterwäsche, Socken, Hose, Shirt und, ganz wichtig, Schuhe!! Auch ein Handtuch wäre nicht schlecht, da man nach Drehende eventuell doch etwas „blutig“ aussehen könnte.)

@Follower 
#UweBoll #movie #movies #horror #splatter #germany #frankenstein #independent #fun

items.text:
Deadlands — Cinematic Dark Western Orchestra | No Copyright Music | No Content ID
Step into the brutal and lawless world of Deadlands by Didier Junk — a dark cinematic western journey through abandoned frontier towns, burning saloons, violent outlaws, desperate survival and endless deserts filled with fear, panic and bloodshed.

Inspired by the emotional intensity of classic western epics, dark frontier legends and cinematic orchestral storytelling, this soundtrack combines haunting violins, fragile saloon piano, massive percussion, giant orchestral crescendos and monumental “Wall Of Sound” energy.

This is music for:
western filmmakers
dark cinematic creators
cowboy storytelling
outlaw documentaries
crime atmospheres
dramatic trailers
historical western videos
survival scenes
apocalyptic frontier worlds
dust storm cinematic edits

Deadlands transports you into a collapsing frontier where fear rules the desert, criminals control the roads and survival becomes the only law.

This music library is available FREE for creators without Content-ID claims for standard YouTube and social media use.

If you want:
exclusive original tracks
premium cinematic versions
commercial licenses
extended editions
member-only soundtrack collections
direct support for the composer

please consider becoming a channel member of Didier Junk.

Perfect for:
Dark Western • Outlaw Atmosphere • Frontier Horror • Cinematic Tension • Cowboy Drama • Survival Stories • Epic Orchestral Music • Dust Storm Ambience • Historical Cinematic Videos • Wall Of Sound Orchestra

🎥Kulisy powstawania profesjonalnego teledysku.

Podczas TECHDAY będziecie mieli wyjątkową okazję zobaczyć na żywo, jak powstaje profesjonalny teledysk rapowy. Michał Mazurek razem z Norbertem Możdżyńskim ze Scorpio Team pokażą cały proces tworzenia klipu - od pracy z kamerą, przez sceny nagraniowe, aż po klimat prawdziwego planu zdjęciowego. To niepowtarzalna szansa, żeby zajrzeć za kulisy produkcji i poczuć energię rapowego teledysku tworzonego w czasie rzeczywistym.

Sprawdź na https://techday.pl/
Wstęp darmowy po rejestracji.

📅 09 Czerwca 2026 | 10:00 - 17:00
📌 ul. Augustówka 19, 02-981 Warszawa | Hollywood Studio 

#beiks #techday2026 #teledysk #filmowanie #wideo

items.text:
🎬 DALEJ POSZUKIWANY DŹWIĘKOWIEC - DOLNY ŚLĄSK (Świdnica)
Film krótkometrażowy „WSZYSCY TAK MÓWIĄ” 2026

Produkcja niezależna, non-profit, Świdnica (Dolny Śląsk)

Szukam najlepiej lokalnego dźwiękowca (z własnym sprzętem) do realizacji autorskiego filmu krótkometrażowego. Psychologicznego horroru/thrillera skupionego na napięciu relacji i stopniowym odkrywaniu prawdy o rodzinie.

Zdjęcia planowane są jako kameralna, dobrze przygotowana produkcja.

Ważne są chęci, nie doświadczenie.

❗️Wymagany własny sprzęt.

Terminy produkcji:

połowa lipca - testy techniczne i spotkanie ekipy

początek sierpnia - zdjęcia główne (4 dni zdjęciowe)

Zapewniamy wyżywienie na planie, transport lokalny, materiały do portfolio, oficjalne kredyty filmowe, udział w festiwalowej dystrybucji filmu.

Zgłaszać się można przez maila (kontakt.chmielekfilms@gmail.com) lub na priv.

items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

***We are still seeking the roles below for our Storyhive short. Please submit ASAP!* **

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

items.text:
Casting call for non-speaking product video
Still trying to find the last talent for this shoot! I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for: Ethnically ambiguous (tan/brown skin tone) male, age late 30's or 40's.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face with a razor on camera.

Location: White Rock

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with your schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 for approximately 3 hours.

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

Subject line: “shaving casting”

If you have already applied to my earlier casting call, there is no need to re-apply.

POWERHOUSE CASTING IS SEEKING FEMALE MARTIAL ARTISTS FOR A SODA COMMERCIAL SHOOTING IN URUGUAY, SOUTH AMERICA!

KARATE MASTER

Female. 30s–50s. Open Ethnicity.

We are looking for a fit, disciplined woman with real martial arts experience and strong physical coordination.

She should feel authentic performing karate chops, kicks, and sharp physical movements on camera — and fully commit to a powerful “HIYAHH!” while doing it.

COMPENSATION IF BOOKED & USED IN THE COMMERCIAL IS UPWARDS OF $6500.00 CAD PER PERSON

THIS IS A NON UNION JOB. IF YOU HAVE AN AGENT, PLEASE ASK THEM TO SUBMIT YOU OVER BREAKDOWNEXPRESS

THIS IS OPEN TO ALL CANADIAN RESIDENTS

***EVERYONE MUST HAVE A VALID PASSPORT WITH AT LEAST 6 MONTHS LEFT ON IT PRIOR TO EXPIRY***

IMPORTANT DATES:

• Callbacks: May 28, 2026 IN-PERSON IN TORONTO OR OVER ZOOM

• Shoot: June 9–11, 2026

• Location: Uruguay

• Travel Hold: June 5–13, 2026

***ALL FOOTAGE MUST BE SUBMITTED NO LATER THAN MONDAY, MAY 25TH @ 9:00AM EST

SUBMISSION LINK:

sharedPost.text:
LOOKING FOR A JOB THIS SUMMER?
THIS IS YOUR SIGN 👀✨

If you’re confident, fun, a little bit crazy and don’t mind dressing up as princesses, superheroes, pirates or popstars… we want YOU! 🎤🦸‍♀️👑

We’re holding an open day TOMORROW at 11.30am for anyone interested in joining the Starkidz team as a party host 🎉

No boring office vibes here… just making magical memories, dancing round with kids, games, music and being part of the best team 💖

Weekend work, great pay and honestly one of the most fun jobs ever ✨

Pop us a DM for more info!

🎼 I didn’t expect Austria to feel like this…
Something about the mix of movement and music just pulls you in. ✨
💃 Hard to describe—better seen than explained.
🎟️ If you’re curious: https://1kb.link/3F4Hyo
💛 A performance that stays with you.

items.text:
Lexington, Kentucky

Sound Mixer needed to replace my mixer for the last days of an Independent feature film(Tuesday June 2nd - Wednesday June 3rd). Must have own equipment. Rate: $300/day

Please send resumes to KingsCountyNobles@gmail.com

items.title: Lexington, Kentucky

items.text:
Hi everyone!

We are looking for extras for a nightclub scene in Beverly Hills for our independent series **COLD CITY**.

We need men and women, ages 21–45, all ethnicities are welcome.

**Date:** Thursday, May 28
**Call time:** 10:00 AM
**Location:** Beverly Hills
**Outfit:** Nightclub / going-out look, something you would wear to a nice club in Beverly Hills.

This is a small independent production, so we can offer a **$20 gas fee**, food on set, and a chance to be part of our series, meet great people, and have a fun filming experience.

If you’re interested and available, please send me a private message for all the details.

Thank you so much, and have a great day!

items.title: Hi everyone!

items.text:
Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting. 

I would like to put it out there again that I am an actor based in KY and always ready for work!

I am 19 years old and 5’8”

According to many, my main types to play in film are 

1.  Intelligent outsider
2. Introverted lead
3. Anxious teen
4. Horror protagonist 
5. Artistic/creative student 
6. Emotionally observant character
7. Younger character in mystery/drama
8. Sarcastic teen

I have a lot of experience in film and theatre and always looking to expand! I am also looking for representation to take a step up in the industry.

items.summary:
Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting. 

I would like to put it out there again that I am an actor based in KY and always ready for work!

I am 19 years old and 5’8”

According to many, my main types to play in film are 

1.  Intelligent outsider
2. Introverted lead
3. Anxious teen
4. Horror protagonist 
5. Artistic/creative student 
6. Emotionally observant character
7. Younger character in mystery/drama
8. Sarcastic teen

I have a lot of experience in film and theatre and always looking to expand! I am also looking for representation to take a step up in the industry.

Dm me for collaboration! 

When you dm I will send my resume and demo reel.

items.text:
SUPPORTING ACTORS NEEDED FOR A DARK COMEDY SHORT FILM

We are London-based filmmakers looking for speaking and non-speaking supporting artists for our dark comedy short film.

Shooting dates:

1 June and 5 June

1 JUNE

We are ideally looking for 7–10 supporting artists.

Small speaking roles:

Male, 50–60

Male or Female, 20–30

Dress code:

Smart outfit

Male: mainly black

Female: gold, silver, beige, or light brown dress

Bonus if you have non-bulky gold or silver jewellery

5 JUNE

We are ideally looking for 8–10 supporting artists.

Small speaking role:

Male or Female, 20–35

No specific dress code required.

Even if you are only available for one of the two days, that would still be a big help.

Unfortunately, this is an unpaid opportunity as it is a student project, but travel costs within London will be covered and food will be provided on set.

If you would like to be part of an energetic and professional team, please email:

contact@richardkcinematics.com

Subject line: Party Time

Deadline 28th of MAY

items.text:
LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS
LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas. 

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

ROLE DETAILS

Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show) 

£50 daily subsidy per working day 

Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

AUDITION DATES  

London (Camberley Theatre) 

Monday 8th – Friday 12th June 

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 

Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

LONDON 

https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125

MANCHESTER 

https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126

If you have any questions, please contact eventhr@lapland.group

items.text:
Hello!! 

We are casting for our short film in North Wales! A 15 minute short by Westminster university graduates, set in the sixties. The story focuses on the lead character Sal as she navigates love and leaving her home town. 

The shoot is focused on inclusivity through our crew and cast! We are looking for actors of any experience range as we want to provide opportunities for creatives in the area. 

Please see the casting call for the the lead roles on this post. We are looking for actors based in and around north wales. 

Unpaid but food, copy and credit provided. 

Please dm me or email @kellysarah2608@gmail.com for more information. 

Thank you!

items.text:
I went through emerging artist LA & got signed to my agency! 

Now I’m helping you do the same! 

It’s been so fun being on set and getting more quality auditions & the training I got from emerging artists before their agency showcase has really carried me through my acting career.

Emerging Artist LA got Max Torina from Disney Channel signed originally & Elle Paris Legaspi from the reboot of party of 5! 

And they’re opening their doors to more actors. 

Train, go to an agency showcase, and hopefully get signed! 

Here’s their sign up link 

https://www.studiotalentsearch.com/

GET ON SCREEN. •PERFORM & POTENTIALLY GET SIGNED •ACTING, AC MODELING SINGING TRAINING ·GET SEEN BY REAL TALENT AGENTS •WORK WITH INDUSTRY PROFESSIONALS •ALL EXPERIENCE LEVELS WELCOME •A SAFE, SUPPORTIVE ENVIRONMENT PARENT-APPROVED PROGRAMS TRUSTED, CERTIFIED INDUSTRY PARTNERS. WE PARTNER ONLY WITH TRUSTED, CERTIFIED TALENT AGENCIES. *MUST HAVE PARENT OR LEGAL GAURDIAN PERMISSION APPLY UNDER 18 YEARS OLD @EMERGINGARTISTLA'

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Ari and I have been an actor for over 14 years. With over 50 tv and film credits to my name - featuring co-star and guest star roles on tv shows such as Blue Bloods, 911 Nashville, Elsbeth and Power - I decided to start my business of acting consultations with actors looking to start their careers but not knowing how!
Please reach out to me to schedule a session!

IMDb.me/aribarkan

items.text:
LEAD ACTRESS CASTING CALL!

PRODUCTION: Star Wars Project (being shot in Georgia) 

CHARACTER CASTING - Jedi Master Shaak Ti 

TARGET DAYS OF SHOOTING - Saturday July 18th and Saturday August 15th  

CHARACTER's DESCRIPTION - Mid 20s to early 30s, female, extremely attractive, average height, medium build, in-shape, athletic-type, model body-type, is a Torgruta Jedi Master & member of the Jedi Council, one of the most wise and patient Jedi Master, very skilled in lightsaber combat & the ways of the force, prefers the method of negotiation rather than resorting to fighting but will fight if she has to

QUALIFICATIONS - Must live in Georgia\be based in Georgia, has reliable means of transportation, is in physical shape for the role, average heighas on-set experience, is comfortable doing their own stunts, is a quick-study, easy to work with on set, has strong communication & organizational skills, is a fan of the Star Wars universe

DETAILS - Will be given an IMDB credit and copies of their scenes and the project itself 

If you're an actress in the Atlanta area, or in Georgia, that would love the opportunity to portray Jedi Master, Shaak Ti, please reach out to the Director via his email contact listed below. Upon contact, make sure to include any headshots and best way of contact.

* DIRECTOR's EMAIL - djbasic22@gmail.com

DIRECTOR & PRODUCER: CHRISTOPHER BRISBANE ASSISTANT DIRECTOR: ANIABAN ROY CHRISTIAN PENN FYTH FAYTH BYER MILES JOHNSON BUTTERWORTH CHRISTOPHER KASH SHANE MITCHELL'

items.text:
Hey everyone, my name is Elias from 2 Liters Shady Films and I just released a new trailer for my indie horror feature film, Mocos. If you have a few minutes of your time, I’d really appreciate you checking it out.

I’m an independent filmmaker currently writing, editing, and filming the project myself, so every view, like, comment, and share truly goes a long way in supporting indie creators like me. 

I’m still actively filming and looking for anyone interested in getting involved with the feature film. No experience is necessary, and I have a ton of remote self-film scenes available that can be done right from the comfort of your own home using my detailed instructions.

If interested, feel free to message me directly or email me at mocosthemovie@gmail.com

Thank you again for the support and for helping independent horror continue to grow!

https://youtu.be/UcvK93KTtzY?si=_KVtQ_4leSnZgkw3

sharedPost.text:
“CDP” o Chef de Partie 👨‍🍳🔥

Ito yung chef na assigned sa specific station sa kusina — halimbawa grill, pasta, fry, pantry, o hot kitchen.

Siya yung may responsibility siguraduhin na maayos ang prep, quality, at labas ng pagkain sa station niya habang service.

Sa madaling salita…
Siya yung “boss” ng station niya 😅

Kaya pag CDP ka na:
• Mas mataas pressure
• Mas madaming responsibility
• Ikaw sasalo pag sabog station mo 😂

Pero real talk…
Dito din nahahasa leadership, bilis, at diskarte mo sa kusina.

At minsan… dito nagsisimula na matatawag kang “qpal” kasi gusto ma promote agad 😄 hahaha” arayy mo…. #cheflife #cheflifedaily

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL: BODY DOUBLE for AMELIA GETHING
We’re seeking a female Supporting Artist / Body Double for Amelia Getting in an upcoming psychological thriller

Details:

Role:Body Double

Age:30–40 years

Accent:British preferred

Filming: 

Recall: 30th May

Shoot: 2–7 days between June 2–19, 2026

Location:Hampshire, UK (Studio)

Requirements:

- Similar build and features to Amelia Gething

- Recent headshots/photos (including no makeup)

- Height, clothing size, and measurements

- CV/showreel (if available)

- Confirm availability for filming dates

📧 Email: hello@thinkv.co.uk

📱 WhatsApp: 0788 6257 110

topComments.text: And with urgent casting calls should come a higher fee......?

sharedPost.text:
🎬 ZDJĘCIE DO REKWIZYTU – DO WSPÓŁCZESNEGO SERIALU 🎬  

Do sesji rekwizytowej poszukujemy zdjęcia dojrzałej, ciepłej kobiety w wieku powyżej 60 lat

Zdjęcie zostanie wykorzystane w scenie na okładce magazynu dla kobiet 

💰 Stawka: 40 zł netto  
(płatne przelewem po odesłaniu wypełnionej umowy)

📅 Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń:  
23 maja, godz. 20:00  

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com  
Temat wiadomości: „zdjęcie”

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:  
– imię i nazwisko  
– wiek  
– 2 przykładowe zdjęcia (selfie)  

📸 Wymagania do zdjęć:  
– bez osób towarzyszących  
– bez nakryć głowy  
– bez okularów  
– tło dowolne  

⚠️ Osoba wysyłająca zdjęcie musi posiadać pełne prawa do jego wykorzystania.

Zapraszamy! 🎥

sharedPost.text:
🏗️ Ekipa kompletna? Brakuje tylko Ciebie! Trwa casting do reklamy marketu budowlanego! 🏗️

! NOWY CASTING ! SUPER PRZYGODA !

Do najnowszej reklamy znanego marketu budowlanego poszukujemy:

Mężczyzna

Wiek ok. 40-45 lat. Zadbany, dobrze wyglądający mężczyzna o łagodnym, ale stanowczym i budzącym zaufanie wyglądzie. Uroda klasyczna, z zarostem: krótsza broda lub wąsy. Włosy ciemne, dłuższe, klasyczna, ale nowoczesna fryzura. Twarz i mimika na tyle elastyczne, aby pasowały do kilku różnych ról i emocji.

Must have: nienaganna wymowa i dykcja.

Kobieta

Wiek ok. 45-50 lat. Raczej zwykła z urody, mieszkanka większego miasta. Uroda klasyczna, naturalna, zapadająca w pamięć, taka „do polubienia”. Włosy długie lub średniej długości, kolor raczej blond, ciemny blond, brąz, klasyczna fryzura z możliwym upięciem. Twarz i mimika na tyle elastyczne, aby pasowały do kilku różnych ról i emocji. Pogodna, uśmiechnięta, budząca zaufanie, „dziewczyna z sąsiedztwa”.

Must have: nienaganna wymowa i dykcja.

STAWKI:

Od 3 000 zł!

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

Wizytówka + scenki 

TIMING:

31.05 — termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń do godz. 18
03.06 — recall
12.06 — przymiarki
15.06 — zdjęcia w Warszawie

 
ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenek proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl 
 
Tytuł: 062

Link do castingu i opis scenek:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting062/

Zrób pierwszy krok i pokaż się przed kamerą! Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

sharedPost.text:
🥤 Masz koncertową energię i komediowy luz? Weź udział w reklamie znanego napoju! 🥤
 
! ŚWIETNA PRZYGODA ! MUZYCZNY KLIMAT !

Do reklamy znanego napoju poszukujemy wyrazistych, charyzmatycznych osób z naturalną energią i wyczuciem komedii. Szukamy zarówno osób o klasycznej urodzie, jak i tych bardziej charakterystycznych- liczy się osobowość, luz i dobra energia przed kamerą!

Jesteśmy otwarci na wszelkie narodowości i różne typy urody.

POSZUKUJEMY:

1. ONA – dziewczyna 23-33 lat (wyglądająca na tyle); otwartość na wszelkie kolory skóry i typy urody. Liczy się charyzma, błysk w oku, naturalny luz i komediowe wyczucie; ze świadomością ruchową.

2. ON – chłopak 23-33 lat (wyglądający na tyle); otwartość na wszelkie kolory skóry i typy urody. Liczy się charyzma, błysk w oku, naturalny luz i komediowe wyczucie; ze świadomością ruchową.
 

3. WSPÓŁLOKATORZY – 2 x epizod z wizerunkiem. 23-33 lat (wyglądający na tyle); otwartość na wszelkie kolory skóry i typy urody. Liczy się charyzma, błysk w oku, naturalny luz i komediowe wyczucie.

4. MUZYCY – EPIZODY z wizerunkiem – 4 x osoby z bandu: perkusja / bas / gitara + wokal. Osoby, które realnie grają na tych instrumentach. Możemy szukać zarówno kobiet jak i mężczyzn. Mocna energia, luz, wyrazistość. Chętnie poszukiwany cały zespół!

 
5. WIDOWNIA – EPIZODY z wizerunkiem –  4 osoby, które będą w najbliższym otoczeniu bohaterki na widowni / w stronę których będzie leciał bohater. Klimat ten sam jak przy pozostałych rolach.

6. TANCERKA

STAWKI:

Role główne: od 4 000 zł !
Epizody: od 3 000 zł !
Tancerka: od 1000zł !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
Wizytówka + scenka 

TIMING:

02.06 do 16:00 – Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń
08.06 – Recall
12.06 – Przymiarki
16.06 – Zdjęcia w Warszawie

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl 

Temat: 061

Link do castingu i opis scenek:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting061/

Wstrząśnij energią i rozkręć ten casting! Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
Looking for a filming location around Los Angeles for upcoming NYFA MFA Producing short film projects.

Does anyone have access to either:

• A therapist office that could be used for a one-day shoot

OR preferably

• A house with a home office that could double as a therapist office, along with a living room, kitchen, bedroom, and some type of patio/backyard area.

Ideally looking for a location available for 3 filming days in a row so I can shoot multiple projects the same week:
• Bad at Love
• Love Bots
• Love

(Yes, there is definitely a theme there.)

I should have pitch packet materials available soon, but finding the location first is important so I know which project to focus on for my class production. Only one film is for class, but I am trying to complete multiple projects around the same timeframe. If everything can be filmed together, my school will be able to cover the location insurance.

Please message me if you know of a possible location or someone who might be interested. Thank you!

- LuvLeighAn Clark
items.groupTitle: LA Actors, Agents, Casting Directors, Producers

Please message me if you know of a possible location or someone who might be interested. Thank you!

- LuvLeighAn Clark

items.text:
🚗🎬 CASTING – REKLAMA MARKI SAMOCHODOWEJ 🎬🚗
Hej,

zapraszam na casting do reklamy marki samochodowej.

Na tym etapie nie mamy jeszcze karty castingowej — zgłoszenie polega na wysłaniu wizytówki.

🔎 SZUKAMY:

🎭 ROLE MÓWIONE

(szukamy wyłącznie aktorów)

👨 1. Mężczyzna ok. 40 lat

• raczej ciemne włosy

• krótki zarost lub bez

• mimiczna twarz z widocznymi reakcjami emocji

👨 2. Mężczyzna ok. 30 lat

• pozytywny

• uśmiechnięty

• może mieć lekko nieśmiały vibe

👩 3. Kobieta ok. 40 lat

• ciekawa

• naturalna aktorka

🎬 EPIZODY (bez tekstu)

👥 4-osobowa ekipa najmu

• wiek 25–40 lat

• pracownicy salonu / warsztatu

📅 TERMINY:

• 03.06 – Recall

• 25.06 – przymiarki (TBC)

• 29/30.06 lub 01.07 – zdjęcia

💰 STAWKI:

⭐ GŁÓWNI BOHATEROWIE (3 osoby)

• dzień zdjęciowy – 1200 zł brutto

• prawa – 4000 zł brutto

⭐ EKIPA NAJMU (4 osoby)

• dzień zdjęciowy – 1200 zł brutto

• prawa – 2400 zł brutto

📩 Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na:

plan@filmakcja.pl

✉️ W tytule maila wpiszcie rolę, do której się zgłaszacie.

W treści zgłoszenia proszę podać:

• imię i nazwisko

• wiek

• numer telefonu

• wyraźne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki

• wizytówkę

🎞️ Zainteresowanym wyślę link do zgłoszenia.

Marta Filmakcja 🎞️🎬😉

items.text: Tomorrow - FREE CLASS! (DM to book)

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
You are in for a grandma-granddaughter, human-organ-smuggling-to-Poland road trip of a lifetime. But in order to film it, we have to rent the car, pay the gran, buy food and, and, and… well, all of that requires money. And technology too.

We are a team of women creatives making **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")**, a darkly funny road-trip film set in the 1990s.

Sasha, a troubled woman tangled in organized crime, is tasked with smuggling a cooler of human organs from Ukraine to Poland. Her unpredictable grandmother unexpectedly joins the journey, turning the trip into something neither of them expects.

We're currently competing for funding through Decentralized Pictures and would love your support.

**How to help:**
1. Open Chrome on your laptop.
2. Visit: https://app.decentralized.pictures/.../6a11e333fde507ae32...
3. Find **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")** in the Filmmakers Assistance Grant.
4. Vote and leave a review.
5. Share with anyone who supports independent cinema.

If you're a filmmaker, Decentralized Pictures is also a great resource for discovering film funding opportunities.

[[https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – GŁÓWNA ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

 

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **CHŁOPCA 9-12 lat **uzdolnionego wokalnie (najchętniej śpiew ludowy, choć niekoniecznie).

Zdjęcia planowane na rok 2027, w tej chwili rozpoczynamy castingi.

** **

 

Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć wizytówkę jako link do You Tube, krótki opis doświadczenia przed kamerą oraz nagranie śpiewu chłopca (również jako link do You Tube).

Proszę nie podawać doświadczenia w reklamach ani statystowania.

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **WBG**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka. Bez osób towarzyszących na zdjęciu.

items.text:
Für einen Werbedreh in Stuttgart mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft suchen wir noch Komparsen im alter von 12-18 Jahren, Jungen und Mädchen, die gut bis sehr gut Fußball spielen können. 

Das ganze ist leider sehr Spontan und findet bereits morgen statt. 

Bei Interesse bitte direkt 1-2 Fotos mit schicken. 
Vielen Dank und vielleicht bis morgen.

topComments.text: Ich habe dir übrigens schon einmal in den Kommentaren bei einem ähnlichen Beitrag geschrieben, dass man dir leider keine DM schicken kann und auch keine E-Mail-Adresse für Bewerbungen angegeben ist.
Es gibt auch gar kein Hinweis über die Gage?!

items.text:
Actors —

We are currently developing and adapting De Nieuwe Ridderorde (1832), South Africa’s first play.

For almost 200 years, these characters and scenes have never truly been brought to life for a modern audience.

Starting this June, we will begin filming vertical storytelling scenes and performances based on the material.

This is an opportunity to:
• become one of the first actors to perform these characters,
• help shape the future adaptation of South Africa’s first play,
• and leave your own interpretation and creative mark on material that has been dormant for generations.

If you want to be part of bringing this forgotten piece of South African theatre history back to life, apply below:

https://forms.gle/Xdtiof1BziSTGWZG9

items.summary:
Actors —

We are currently developing and adapting De Nieuwe Ridderorde (1832), South Africa’s first play.

For almost 200 years, these characters and scenes have never truly been brought to life for a modern audience.

Starting this June, we will begin filming vertical storytelling scenes and performances based on the material.

This is an opportunity to:
• become one of the first actors to perform these characters,
• help shape the future adaptation of South Africa’s first play,
• and leave your own interpretation and creative mark on material that has been dormant for generations.

If you want to be part of bringing this forgotten piece of South African theatre history back to life, apply below:

https://forms.gle/Xdtiof1BziSTGWZG9

Should your application be successful the team will contact you directly. NB! Rako Media is a boutique artist supplier and arts management agency. Our services include Artist Management Entertainment supply, Film crew and live music performance bookings.'

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL:  JESSICA**

**Halfway Pictures is now casting JESSICA, a supernatural horror feature film.**

Paid · Non-Union

Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · reads as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · reads as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s
Olivia — Supporting · Female · reads as 7
David — Supporting · Male · mid-30s

Submission deadline: June 17, 2026
Auditions: June 20, 2026, 4:00–8:30 PM
Rate: $200/day
Shoot dates: July 1–14, 2026

Airfare and lodging will be provided for selected actors coming from outside Winnipeg, including from the United States.

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

**Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.**

items.text:
**WE’RE BACK! - THE PRICE IS RIGHT TONIGHT SEASON 2**

*The Price is Right Tonight *hosted by Howie Mandel is back for season 2! And we'd love to see you apply!! Join our studio audience for a chance to come on down and play for big wins, big prizes and big money!

**DATES:**

Filming takes place in Toronto from June 23rd to 30th, 2026, with three daily tapings at 12:30 pm, 4:00 pm and 7:00 pm. 

**APPLICATION DETAILS:**

You must apply as a group of at least 4 people (including yourself), with the option to apply with up to 10 people total. Groups can include friends, family, or colleagues!

Complete the application below and submit a photo for each group member.

**ELIGIBILITY:**

Each applicant must complete their own section, review, and agree to the rules at the end of the form.

To be eligible to compete:
* All applicants must be 19+ at the time of application
* All applicants must have the right to live and work in Canada
* All applicants must be available to film in Toronto between June 23 - 30, 2026

Below is the application link for the show. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to [Casting@priceproductionsinc.com](mailto:Casting@priceproductionsinc.com)

APPLY HERE NOW: [https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/](https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/)

Hello! We are looking for Background Extras for this Saturday May 30th in Vancouver! 
This is a volunteer position but meals and credits will be provided.
It’s going to be a super fun day with an awesome crew. We would love to have you on set 🙂 

Please email stetsonpoulin@gmail.com if you are interested!

💛 One of the most memorable live performances I’ve seen.

🎬 **TV-PROJEKT SUCHT: Ein Raum-Makeover in Köln & Umgebung! ⛺**

Hey zusammen! 👋 Habt ihr Lust, euch entspannte Festival-Vibes in die eigenen vier Wände zu holen?

Für ein neues TV-Projekt verwandelt Raumdesignerin Emell Gök Che deinen Raum in eine warme, gemütliche Wüsten-Oase im coolen „Desert Modern“-Style. ✨🌵

Mehr Infos gibt’s im verlinkten Post. Wenn ihr Lust auf das Makeover habt, meldet euch einfach per PN bei mir! 📧

sharedPost.text:
Du wohnst in Köln oder Umgebung und hast Lust auf einen echten Tapetenwechsel?🌿🐪 Wir holen dir die entspannten Festival-Vibes des legendären „Burning Man“ direkt nach Hause!🎉Raumdesignerin Emell Gök Che verwandelt deinen Raum in eine gemütliche Wüsten-Oase – warm, erdig und modern. Das Ganze wird für ein öffentlich-rechtliches TV-Format begleitet und aufgezeichnet.✨🌵

Du hast Interesse? Schreib uns eine PN oder melde dich per Mail an wohnenunddesign@bavaria-entertainment.de📧

#Köln #NRW #DesertModern #FestivalVibes #InteriorDesign #Wohnung #Haus #Makeover #VorherNachher #Emell #WüstenLook #Interior #Zuhause #Wohnideen #Casting #CastingCall #TV #Dreharbeiten #ÖffentlichRechtlich #BavariaEntertainment #KölnUndUmgebung #Projektabschluss #DesignLiebe #Mitmachen #WohnTrend #BurningMan

items.text:
Hey zusammen :)
ich bin 20 und möchte mich ernsthaft im Schauspiel weiterentwickeln – sowohl im Bereich Theater als auch Film.
Ich habe bereits mit Monologen gearbeitet und erste Vorsprechen-Erfahrung gesammelt, merke aber, dass mir vor allem Praxis, Austausch und Kontakte fehlen.
Deshalb suche ich:
– Leute auf ähnlichem Level zum gemeinsamen Üben (Monologe/Szenen)
– kleine Film- oder Theaterprojekte (auch Low Budget/Studentenprojekte)
– und generell Austausch mit anderen Schauspieler:innen (gern auch etwas erfahrener), z.B. zu Themen wie Einstieg, Agenturen etc.
Mir geht es darum, Erfahrung zu sammeln, besser zu werden und mich Schritt für Schritt in dem Bereich aufzubauen.
Ich bin zuverlässig, motiviert und offen für Neues 🙌
Falls jemand Lust hat, sich auszutauschen oder etwas zusammen zu starten, schreibt mir gern!

topComments.text:
Hey Lia.
Gut zu wissen wäre, wo du ansässig bist. 
Also eher Berlin, Hamburg, München, Köln oder Pusemuckel... 🤭😆

LG und VIEL ERFOLG!

items.text: Hi guys! Starting this fall, I’ll be splitting my time between LA and Vancouver, Canada. I have a beautiful 1-bedroom apartment in South Vancouver and I’m looking to connect with a female actress in LA who might be interested in occasional apartment swaps (LA/VAN), hosting each other from time to time, or something along those lines. Would love to connect if that sounds like something you’d be into. Thanks so much :) My IG is https://www.instagram.com/iammagalie/

items.text:
Web Series Casting!

TPWM, a light hearted web-series exploring masculinity in America is looking to cast for its first season. 

Who we are:

A group of emerging filmmakers working to bring an exciting Web Series to life and need your help! 

What do we need:

Actors! We have a full season to cast and need humble thespians such as yourself! Since there are a wide array of available roles, we're asking that everyone come in with one comedy and one dramatic monologue. 

When are auditions:

We'll be hosting auditions on Sunday Jun 7th. 

Where will they be:

Location will be emailed to you upon confirmation. 

For anyone who can't make it, we're asking for self tapes to be sent to [theproblemwmseries@gmail.com](mailto:theproblemwmseries@gmail.com)

What we offer:

Free Session with our Headshot Photographer

Food & Bev

In-Kind Creative Services

We are a no-budget production but we want to figure out how to make it work with you! So we're open to negotiate.

Thank you for taking the time. We're excited to get to know you!

topComments.text: Whatever you need I’m down to help
If you could use me, you would have to get me there. I'm willing to cover room and food.

items.text:
🎬 ŁÓDŹ / POSZUKIWANY AKTOR EPIZODYCZNY DO ETIUDY ŁÓDZKIEJ SZKOŁY FILMOWEJ
📅 22-26.06

Cześć!

Poszukujemy aktora epizodycznego do roli kierowcy autobusu w dyplomie reżyserskim studenta PWSFTVIT 

Szukamy mężczyzn w wieku koło 30 lat

💸 Zlecenie płatne.

🎥 Zdjęcia odbędą się w dniach 22-26.06, natomiast aktor będzie potrzebny podczas tylko jednego dnia zdjęciowego (postaramy się dopasować pod dyspozycyjność kandydata)

📍 Łódź

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:

— imię i nazwisko

— wiek

— aktualne zdjęcie i showreel

items.text:
Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam:

- Tomasz Drzewosz   (38) – ofiara pobicia, mąż Anny. Sprawny fizycznie mężczyzna, trochę zaniedbany, z zarostem, brzuszkiem piwnym. Nadużywa alkoholu, sprawca przemocy domowej. 1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ netto

- Anna Drzewosz (35) – żona Tomasza, zajmuje się domem, ofiara przemocy domowej. Szczupła, nieśmiała, unika kontaktu wzrokowego. 8 scen
AKTORKA 
DATA: 9.06 i 12.06
STAWKA: 1400 zł netto za 2 dni

- Mateusz Malik (36) – sprawca pobicia, działał na zlecenie, pracuje jako dostawca jedzenia. Sprawny fizycznie, silny, tzw. „byczek”. Ma za sobą wyrok za rozbój. Małomówny.  1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Konrad Sołtysik (45) – stalker Anny, zleceniodawca pobicia. Średnia budowa ciała, mało atrakcyjny, kuleje. Ubrany kiczowato, w stylu „tania elegancja”, skryty, obsesyjny, przekonany, że Anna potrzebuje jego ochrony. 3 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Sąsiad Grzegorz Siwiec  (42) – sąsiad z bloku Tomasza i Anny, skonfliktowany z Tomaszem o miejsce parkingowe. Tęgi, głośny, szybko się irytuje, ubiera się w dresy. 2 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Barman Piotr Kwieciński (28) – barman, dobrze wygląda, ładny. Nerwowy, cwany. Zgadzał się na dilowanie na zapleczu w zamian za pieniądze. 4 sceny
DATA: 8.06 i 12.06
STAWKA: 1000 zł netto za 2 dni

- Ben Beniamin Kaliniak (33) – diler, zwinny, chętnie łysy, ubrany w ciemne kolory. 3 sceny
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Radek Radosław Blajer (35) – diler, niższy, grubszy, w szarej bluzie i jeansach.  1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

- Marzena Rubska (32) – znajoma Mateusza, prosta dziewczyna, zgrabna. Ubrana kiczowato, prostolinijna, rozmowna. 1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Dorian Jesionek (26) – znalazł nieprzytomnego Tomasza. Zwyczajny chłopak, ubrany w jeansy i t-shirt. 1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – KLIP (POZNAŃ)

Szukamy kobiet 18+ do teledysku w klimacie nocnego życia, neonów i luksusowego vibe’u.

📍 Poznań
📅 koniec czerwca

Ważne: swoboda przed kamerą, pewność siebie i gotowość na klubowy nocny klimat
📱 Aktywny Instagram z realnym zaangażowaniem obserwujących będzie dodatkowym atutem

📩 Zgłoszenia tylko na DM strony SamiSwoi 

Jeśli czujesz ten vibe wpadaj

items.text:
A very beautiful and special project is being implemented soon by the Parousia Acting Craft Collective under the direction of Molly Caliger @mollycaligervoice at the Kallirois Theater. We will be happy to have you with us, in a play based on the ancient Greek Myth of Philomele and Procne in the English language. A play that explores human passions, fears and the price that women have paid throughout time for the courage to remain true to themselves. 
PRE-SALE
TICKET SERVICES
– online: [www.ticketservices.gr](https://www.ticketservices.gr)
– by phone: 2107234567
– ticket office: Panepistimiou 39, Athens

items.summary: My nurse is my new camera woman. She killed it
items.title: My nurse is my new camera woman. She killed it

sharedPost.text:
My baby is officially graduating & I’m one proud mama 🥹💙
Watching you grow into such a smart, handsome, funny, and intelligent little boy has been the greatest blessing. You’re becoming such a big boy right before my eyes, and I couldn’t be more proud of you.

Class of 2026 🎓
The world better watch out because my baby is coming! ✨ 
Brianna Oliver

#ClassOf2026 🎓
#ProudMomMoments 💙
#FutureFaceOfFashion 👑  ✨
#YoungKing 👑
#BigBoySeason 🚀

items.text:
🎬 Sounddesigner & Filmkomponist aus München sucht neue Filmprojekte

Hallo zusammen,

mein Name ist Francesco Mangiaracina. Ich bin Sounddesigner, Filmkomponist und Audio Engineer aus München und betreibe die FMM Studios.
Aktuell suche ich neue Kontakte zu Regisseur:innen, Produzent:innen und Filmschaffenden für Kurzfilme, Dokumentationen, Werbefilme, Animationsfilme und andere kreative Projekte.

Ich unterstütze Produktionen in den Bereichen:

🎧 Sounddesign
🎙 Dialogbearbeitung & Sprachrestauration
🎼 Filmmusik / Score Composition
🎬 Ton-Postproduktion
🔊 Stereo-Mischung (5.1 auf Anfrage)

Zu meinen bisherigen Arbeiten gehören unter anderem:

• Die Königin des Schicksals
• Clam Diving for Beginners
• Wenn der Vorhang fällt
• Wo Narzissen blühen
• Bastoni e Denari

Zusätzlich habe ich die Musik für das Werbevideo „FMM Vision“ sowie für einen Animationsfilm des BIFSC komponiert.

Ein Großteil der von mir betreuten Filmprojekte wurde auf nationalen und internationalen Filmfestivals gezeigt und mit verschiedenen Awards ausgezeichnet.

Mit über 25 Jahren Erfahrung in Musikproduktion, Komposition, Mixing & Mastering sowie einem professionell ausgestatteten Tonstudio in München biete ich kreative und technische Lösungen aus einer Hand.

🎬 Referenzen & Showreel:
https://fmm-studios.de/showreel-tonstudio-muenchen

Falls ihr aktuell an einem Filmprojekt arbeitet oder Unterstützung in der Ton-Postproduktion sucht, freue ich mich über eine Nachricht.

Viele Grüße

Francesco Mangiaracina
FMM Studios – München

#sounddesign #filmkomponist #filmmusik #kurzfilm #indiefilm #filmproduktion #postproduktion #dialogedit #audiopostproduktion #filmschaffende #regie #produzent #festivalfilm #animationfilm #werbefilm #münchen

items.text:
🎬 Für unseren Bachelor-Abschlussfilm suchen wir dringend noch einen Schauspieler für eine Vaterrolle, als auch zwei Kleindartseller.

Gedreht wird ein Mystery-Thriller als One-Take (mit Hidden Cuts), inspiriert von „Adolescence“ und „Knives Out“.

👤 Vater von Lennard

•⁠  ⁠männlich, Spielalter 50–60, deutsch

Lennards Vater ist der Stadtpolizist der Kleinstadt: streng, stur, kontrolliert und wenig emotional. Er glaubt an Ordnung und klare Regeln, handelt aber aus dem Wunsch heraus, seine Familie zu beschützen.

👤 Stadtpolizist (Kleindarsteller)

 männlich, Spielalter 35–60, ab 180 cm

📅 Dreh: 28.05. (Nachtdreh, auf den 29.05.)

📍 Erdweg bei Dachau

🍽️ Verpflegung & ggf. Unterkunft vorhanden

💰 Studentenfilm, leider ohne Gage

topComments.text: Bin 34, vielleicht würde es ja passen

sharedPost.text:
🥤 Masz koncertową energię i komediowy luz? Weź udział w reklamie znanego napoju! 🥤
 
! ŚWIETNA PRZYGODA ! MUZYCZNY KLIMAT !

Do reklamy znanego napoju poszukujemy wyrazistych, charyzmatycznych osób z naturalną energią i wyczuciem komedii. Szukamy zarówno osób o klasycznej urodzie, jak i tych bardziej charakterystycznych- liczy się osobowość, luz i dobra energia przed kamerą!

Jesteśmy otwarci na wszelkie narodowości i różne typy urody.

POSZUKUJEMY:

1. ONA – dziewczyna 23-33 lat (wyglądająca na tyle); otwartość na wszelkie kolory skóry i typy urody. Liczy się charyzma, błysk w oku, naturalny luz i komediowe wyczucie; ze świadomością ruchową.

2. ON – chłopak 23-33 lat (wyglądający na tyle); otwartość na wszelkie kolory skóry i typy urody. Liczy się charyzma, błysk w oku, naturalny luz i komediowe wyczucie; ze świadomością ruchową.
 
3. WSPÓŁLOKATORZY – 2 x epizod z wizerunkiem. 23-33 lat (wyglądający na tyle); otwartość na wszelkie kolory skóry i typy urody. Liczy się charyzma, błysk w oku, naturalny luz i komediowe wyczucie.

4. MUZYCY – EPIZODY z wizerunkiem – 4 x osoby z bandu: perkusja / bas / gitara + wokal. Osoby, które realnie grają na tych instrumentach. Poszukujemy zarówno kobiet jak i mężczyzn. Mocna energia, luz, wyrazistość. Chętnie poszukiwany cały zespół!

5. WIDOWNIA – EPIZODY z wizerunkiem –  4 osoby, które będą w najbliższym otoczeniu bohaterki na widowni / w stronę których będzie leciał bohater. Klimat ten sam jak przy pozostałych rolach.

6. TANCERKA/ TANCERZ

STAWKI:

Role główne: od 4 000 zł !
Epizody: od 3 000 zł !
Tancerka: od 1000zł !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
Wizytówka + scenka 

TIMING:

02.06 do 16:00 – Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń
08.06 – Recall
12.06 – Przymiarki
16.06 – Zdjęcia w Warszawie

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl 

Temat: 061

Link do castingu i opis scenek:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting061/

Wstrząśnij energią i rozkręć ten casting! Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

Role główne: od 4 000 zł !
Epizody: od 3 000 zł !
Tancerka: od 1000zł !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
Wizytówka + scenka 

TIMING:

02.06 do 16:00 – Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń
08.06 – Recall
12.06 – Przymiarki
16.06 – Zdjęcia w Warszawie

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl 

Temat: 061

Link do castingu i opis scenek:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting061/

CASTING CALL:

Casting 3 grandmas (senior women 60s-80s). Legal grandma status not necessary. Bonus points if you apply with your friends.

Professional video game players will be teaching you how to play a game, and you will compete against other grandmas to determine the **greatest grandma. **Video will be posted on youtube.

Rate is $40/hr for 5 hours ($200). Shoot is Wednesday June 3, sometime between 9-5 in Vancouver. Project is non - union.

To apply please send a headshot, some information about you, and a reel if available. Deadline Sunday May 31st

Email to: danielfilmSR@gmail.com

I'm filming a music video for my upcoming track "Aged Photographer" on 11th June in Wigan Town, and I'm looking for a young couple who would like to take part on a TFP (Time For Print) basis.

No acting experience is required – just natural chemistry and a willingness to be part of a creative project.

If you're interested, please send me an inbox message and I'll be happy to share more details.

Thank you!

sharedPost.text:
Looking for something new and fun to do? That won’t cost the earth but leave you feeling amazing? 🤔

Come and move, laugh and stress bust with us! My BEGINNERS dance classes are for EVERYBODY. (I can’t stress this enough. Even if you think you can’t dance, in my sessions, we don’t care!) 

Just come have a go. We move for the joy of movement and all the benefits it can bring, not for perfection or to look good. (That happens all on its own, over time. 🙌 And if that’s something you’re striving for, then I’ll help you get there. 👌)

Thursday classes begin again on May 14th. Brand new routine, great time to grab a friend and try your first class for FREE!!!! 

Can’t make Thursdays? That’s ok, drop me a message about Monday classes! 🙌

#danceclasses #liverpoolfitness #beginnersdance #tryitchallenge #FreeClass #trybeforeyoubuy #newhobby #liverpooluk

items.text:
ISO BG actors for 2h on 5/31

Hello, I’m looking for background actors for my short film You’re Not Well. We are shooting in Brooklyn (Bedstuy) this weekend and I need BG actors to play a live audience from a podcast and laugh at our main character. We will get close up shots of your reactions!

We will need you for 2h around from around 3-m to 5 pm.

This is a passion project so unfortunately it is unpaid but we will of course get that footage to you for your reel.

If interested you can email me at nievesgarciaperchin@gmail.com

Thank you!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — LEAD ROLE**

We are casting **LOGAN**, the lead role in the independent feature film **AFTERGLOW**.

**Shoot Dates:** August 13–23
**Filming Days:** Approx. 5–6 days
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA
**Pay:** Deferred pay with contract
**Includes:** IMDb credit, meals, footage

—

**Working Title:** *Afterglow*
**Genre:** Thriller / Drama

**Logline:**
After a party ends in a girl’s disappearance, a closeted teen is torn between the boy he never got over and the girl who helped him set the night in motion.

—

**ROLE: LOGAN — Lead**
**Age Range:** 18–25 to play 18
**Race/Ethnicity:** Open
**Height:** 5’10”–6’2” preferred
**Body Type:** Lean / athletic preferred

Logan is seen as the natural leader of his friend group: magnetic, eccentric, likable, and effortlessly charming without trying. He makes friends easily and draws people in, but beneath that charm, he is quietly unraveling.

Secretly struggling with his sexuality in an environment where vulnerability feels dangerous, Logan is caught between desire, repression, guilt, and the pressure of becoming an adult. He is emotionally guarded, impulsive, reactive, and occasionally self-destructive.

**Seeking LGBTQ+ actors strongly preferred.**

**Important Notes:**
This role requires strong emotional range, vulnerability, and intense chemistry with the actor playing Jason. Chemistry with Jason is essential to the story.

This role **includes intimacy**. All intimacy will be handled professionally, with clear communication, boundaries, and appropriate production protocols.

—

**To Submit:**
Please send your headshot, resume, reel, and availability to:

**[info@afterglowthefilm.com](mailto:info@afterglowthefilm.com)**

topComments.text: I would’ve loved this role but I’m older than what your looking for

items.text:
🎬 MANCHESTER / SALFORD CASTING CALL — INDIE SHORT FILM: A Thousand Miles Apart 🎬

Looking for young actors aged 17–19 for an upcoming dramatic short film shooting this summer.

ABOUT THE FILM
'A Thousand Miles Apart' is a cinematic emotional drama centred around family, guilt, reconciliation and brotherhood. The project is heavily performance focused with a grounded, naturalistic style.

WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

* Male and female actors aged 17–19
* Must be comfortable performing emotionally driven scenes
* Must know how to drive
* Any acting experience welcome
* Based in Manchester or able to travel to filming locations

SHOOT DETAILS
📍 Filming: Mid July 2026
📍 Auditions: Mid June 2026
🎥 Independent short film production

PAYMENT
This is currently an unpaid opportunity, however:

* Travel expenses will be covered
* Professional headshots/photos will be provided
* Great opportunity for portfolio/showreel material and on set experience

If interested, send:

* Your name + age
* A recent photo/self tape (if available)
* Any acting experience
* Your location

DM me directly or email: cole.izrl@gmail.com

Feel free to share with anyone who might fit the role.

Thanks! Hope to see you soon! 👀🎬

CASTING CALL FOR POTENTIAL UNTITLED FOUND FOOTAGE COSMIC HORROR FEATURE
Hi @highlight

My name is Gary Francis Roche, and I am the writer/director/co-producer of an upcoming found footage cosmic horror feature, currently untitled. Over the coming weeks, we’ll be pitching to investors to secure financing for the project as production moves forward.

A little background about myself — I’m a UK-based independent filmmaker with over 8 years of experience across acting, camera operating, editing, storyboarding, animation, and VFX, working in short films, documentaries, corporate media, and genre filmmaking. Over the years, I’ve built strong creative partnerships with talented collaborators and niche companies who continue to support my work.

In 2024, I made my feature directorial debut with the indie screenlife/video game horror film **DEMO_N**, produced on a near-no budget of £10k. The film was later picked up for an exclusive release on Found TV before securing wider distribution through Terror Films Releasing (THE TAKING OF DEBORAH LOGAN, THE HELL HOUSE LLC franchise, THE LAST RADIO CALL). It is now streaming across 15 platforms, including Tubi Screambox Roku UK Apple TV, just to name a few, and with an additional 13 releases still pending.

The film also earned recognition from major horror outlets, with Dread Central praising it for injecting “new life into the screenlife subgenre,” while FANGORIA highlighted its “own spin with the video game element.” We also collaborated with FOUND to launch a playable demo based on the cursed in-film game *TAG! You’re Dead*, helping kickstart their gaming division, which you can download and play for FREE on Steam.

With this second feature, my team and I aim to push even further — crafting something ambitious, innovative, and distinctly original, building upon the visual style and creative voice developed in our first film. Unlike our previous effort, this project is being developed with the support of several established production houses in association with my newly registered company CONTEMPORARY PICTURES, whose identities I’ll remain anonymous about for the time being (a little tease for ya there).

At present, every crew position has been filled and is on standby, while 3 out of 7 cast roles have officially been secured.

We are currently casting:

• THREE female actors
• ONE male actor

If you feel you’d be a strong fit for this project and have the tenacity to take on these roles, please send your reels and/or Spotlight pages to:

[garyfrancisroche@gmail.com](mailto:garyfrancisroche@gmail.com)

We’ll be reaching back out once the project receives its official greenlight.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,

Gary

items.text:
***Are you home educating (or thinking about it) but feeling a bit isolated and worried about your child missing out socially? ❤️‍🩹*** ☕️🙋🏻‍♀️
Well we’ve got a lovely little free **WhatsApp chat** for home educating parents and guardians! 💬🫶🏼

✨ It’s a friendly space to **meet like-minded families**, swap ideas, get inspiration, ask questions, and share encouragement ☺️

Whether you’re a seasoned home educator or just exploring the idea, you’re very welcome to join our little community 💛

Let me know if you'd like to be added! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – MA STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON)
Hi everyone!

We are a group of three MA Visual Effects students in London currently developing a short live-action + CGI film exploring the unseen emotional experiences of wheelchair users and the feelings of exclusion or isolation that can arise in everyday situations.

We are looking for a wheelchair user actor (or performer with lived experience) to play the lead role in our short film.

About the role:

* Lead role in a ~1-minute short film

* A quiet, emotional, visually driven performance

* The story follows a wheelchair user in a casual setting with friends while visualising their internal thoughts and invisible struggles through cinematic VFX metaphors.

Shoot details:

📍 London

📅 TBA (end of May / beginning of June)

💰 All expenses paid 

We are committed to approaching this story with care, authenticity, and respect, and would love to collaborate with someone who connects with the project and would be interested in helping shape the portrayal.

If interested (or if you know someone who may be!), please comment below or send me a DM. We’d be happy to share more details and the project deck/script.

Thank you! ✨

items.text:
Casting Call: Middle-Aged Female Actor (Short Film)
Hello!

I’m currently casting for a short film that follows a mother and daughter reuniting at the daughter’s flat after six months apart. It’s an intimate, fly-on-the-wall chamber drama, shot entirely inside a London flat on a very small budget.

**The role: **
* Mother (playing age 50–60)
*  Warm, complex, emotionally grounded character

I have already cast the daughter, who is Welsh, so a Welsh actor would be ideal for authenticity but this is not essential.

**Shoot dates: **TBC, likely late July.

**Shoot length: **1-2 days.

**Location:** Bow, London.

**Please note that this is an unpaid role, though travel/expenses can be covered where needed. It’s a strong character-driven piece and will be a great collaborative experience with a small team.**

If you’re interested or would like more details about the story/character, feel free to DM me.

Thanks so much!

items.text:
Seeking Male Actor for Private Conversational Role – London
Looking for a British-born South Asian male actor (mid 20s–40s) fluent in Urdu and English with a natural UK accent for a private in-person conversational role.

Requirements:

* Fluent Urdu and English speaker

* British-born with authentic UK accent

* Based in London

* Confident, calm, mature presence

* Able to naturally portray an older brother figure

* Comfortable improvising during conversation

* Acting or voice experience preferred but not essential

The role involves accompanying me during a brief personal meeting and helping communicate seriousness and sincerity in a respectful way.

This is a confidential/private situation, so full details will only be shared with genuinely interested applicants.

Paid role.

Please send:

* Age

* Area of London

* Languages spoken

* Voice note or short video intro

* Any acting/voice experience

items.text:
They saw the results.

They saw the success.

They saw the confidence.

What they didn't see was the journey.

Nobody notices the years spent struggling. Nobody applauds the sacrifices made behind closed doors. The world celebrates the destination, but very few people understand the road it took to get there.

There was a time when he had nothing except a dream and a determination that refused to break. No powerful connections. No special opportunities. No guarantee that things would ever improve.

Just belief.

The kind of belief that keeps a person moving when everyone else says it's impossible.

Life tested him in every way imaginable. Plans failed. Opportunities disappeared. Trust was broken. The future seemed uncertain. There were moments when quitting looked like the smartest option.

But every challenge carried a lesson.

Every setback built resilience.

Every failure revealed a new path forward.

Instead of allowing obstacles to stop him, he used them as stepping stones. While others focused on excuses, he focused on solutions. While others waited for perfect conditions, he learned to create opportunities from imperfect situations.

That decision changed everything.

Success is rarely about talent alone. Many talented people never reach their potential because they stop too soon. The difference often comes down to consistency.

Showing up when you don't feel motivated.

Working when nobody is watching.

Believing when there is no evidence that things will work out.

Those small actions repeated over time create extraordinary results.

Today people look at his life and assume it happened overnight.

They see the victories but not the years of preparation.

They see the confidence but not the battles that built it.

They see the empire but not the foundation laid brick by brick through discipline and persistence.

The truth is that every great achievement begins with a decision.

A decision to keep going.

A decision to learn from failure.

A decision to believe in yourself even when nobody else does.

If you're working toward something meaningful right now, don't let temporary setbacks convince you to stop. Progress often happens quietly before it becomes visible.

Keep building.

Keep learning.

Keep improving.

The effort you invest today may not pay off tomorrow, but it is shaping the future you're creating.

One day people will admire what you've built.

They'll see the success.

They'll see the achievements.

And they'll wonder how you did it.

The answer will be simple.

You never stopped building.

#EmpireMindset #SuccessJourney #NeverGiveUp #MotivationDaily #DisciplineWins #MindsetShift #SelfMade #DreamBig #FutureSuccess #ViralInspiration

I went through emerging artist LA & got signed to my agency! 

Now I’m helping you do the same! 

It’s been so fun being on set and getting more quality auditions & the training I got from emerging artists before their agency showcase has really carried me through my acting career.

Emerging Artist LA got Max Torina from Disney Channel signed originally & Elle Paris Legaspi from the reboot of party of 5! 

And they’re opening their doors to more actors. 

Train, go to an agency showcase, and hopefully get signed! 

Here’s their sign up link 

https://www.studiotalentsearch.com/

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM FROM UNKNOWN TO LEAD ROLES ON NETFLIX
It Seems Like You've Done Everything Right. So How Come Nothing Is Moving?

You trained. You got the headshots. You got the reel. Maybe you even got the agent.
And yet you are sitting here wondering why nothing is moving.

How are you supposed to break into Netflix-level work when nobody actually explains the strategy behind it?

I am Freya Tingley. I’m from Perth. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC's Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It was not.

What you are not being told is that most of the work happens before the audition room. The actors who book have
figured out how to engineer their own access. The ones who do not are still waiting to be discovered.

I have been getting a lot of messages from actors lately saying things like:

"I have an agent but no auditions."
"I am auditioning but not booking."
"I do not know what I am doing wrong."

What if the problem is not your talent?

What if it is the strategy, or the lack of one?

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you are stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next.

I would rather you have clarity than spend another year guessing.

If you know you need to move, DM me "COMMIT" to apply for a session.

What would it cost you to keep doing what you have been doing?

items.text:
🤍 **MODEL & ACTOR CASTING CALL** 💙

**Otwieramy rekrutację dla nowych twarzy!**
Do naszych nadchodzących produkcji fotograficznych, reklamowych, teatralnych oraz fabularnych poszukujemy** dzieci w wieku 4–16 lat.**

Szukamy dzieci, które wyróżniają się urodą, energią i talentem. Mile widziane są osoby odważne, kreatywne i swobodnie czujące się przed aparatem oraz kamerą.

💙 Jeśli Twoje dziecko marzy o przygodzie w świecie modelingu i aktorstwa, wyślij zgłoszenie na adres: **biuro@elsastudio.pl**

**W treści maila prosimy o podanie:**
• imienia i nazwiska dziecka
• wieku
• wzrostu
• miejsca zamieszkania
• numeru telefonu do rodzica
• informacji o doświadczeniu aktorskim lub modelingowym

**Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć:**
🤍 aktualne zdjęcia portretowe oraz sylwetki
💙 krótkie nagranie, w którym dziecko przedstawia się i opowiada o swoich zainteresowaniach

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🤍
Elsa studio

items.text:
Actor. Director. Storyteller.

With 20+ years of experience in film, television, theatre, and commercials, I’ve been fortunate to work on projects for Wegovy, Mizuho Bank, NBC Weather App, AOL, MTV, and a variety of award-winning and independent productions.

Currently directing multiple projects while continuing to pursue acting opportunities. Open to quality collaborations in film, television, commercials, digital media, and branded content.

IMDb, reel, headshots, and professional materials are available upon request.

I am happy to discuss availability, scope, and production needs on a case-by-case basis.

items.text:
Allround-TV geht völlig neue Wege mit Auftrags-Video-Produktionen in virtueller Umgebung. Wir erstellen komplette virtuelle Studios nach Ihren Vorgaben, setzen den Moderator, die Moderatorin via GreenScreen in die virtuelle 3D Umgebung, animieren die Szene mit Tracking-Kameras in Echtzeit und schalten Studiogäste, Interviewpartner, Experten auf Wunsch weltweit via Live-Stream zu. Eine fantastische Möglichkeit, Ihren Video-Content technisch auf der Höhe der Zeit zu erstellen. Ab sofort möglich im eigenen professionellen Video-Studio von Allround-TV in Altötting. Wir setzen Sie in Szene!
Montage & Screenshots © 2026 by Allround-TV

items.text:
CASTING CALL — CHILD ACTRESS (ATLANTA, GA)
Independent Short Film: “Glass Crown: The Repast

Production is currently seeking a young actress to portray ATHENA, a key supporting role in an emotionally grounded dramatic short film.

ROLE:

ATHENA

Black female

Age Range: 6–10 years old

Athena is observant, intelligent, calm, and emotionally mature beyond her years. She carries a quiet presence and strong emotional depth.

FILMING LOCATION:

Atlanta, Georgia

PLEASE NOTE:

Applicants must be based in or able to work as a local hire in Atlanta, GA.

SHOOT DATES:

June 12–14, 2026

(Child actors will not be needed for all shoot days.)

COMPENSATION:

This is an unpaid independent short film project.

Meals will be provided on set.

IMDb credit and festival exposure included.

TO SUBMIT:

Please send:

• Headshot or recent photo

• Age

• Acting reel or self-tape (if available)

• Parent/guardian contact information

Send submissions to:

LadyOnyxx89@gmail.com 

Director:

Jessica Carter

“Glass Crown: The Repast”

Photographer based in Zadar looking for models for a swimwear / beach editorial collaboration (TFP).

👙 Style: swimwear / summer editorial
📅 Date: 07.06.2016 - 11.06.2026

DM with photos / Instagram if interested.

📸 Casting Call – Wigan Town (TFP Collaboration)

I'm filming a music video for my upcoming track "Aged Photographer" on 11th June in Wigan Town, and I'm looking for a young couple who would like to take part on a TFP (Time For Print) basis.

No acting experience is required – just natural chemistry and a willingness to be part of a creative project.

If you're interested, please send me an inbox message and I'll be happy to share more details.

Thank you!
